title: PAK-NZE-Julia: An Open-Source Julia-JuMP Power-Sector Net-Zero Pathway Model for Pakistan with Climate Feedback and Provincial Disaggregation
description: PAK-NZE-Julia is an open-source Julia-JuMP power-sector net-zero pathway model for Pakistan. It extends the power-sector representation of the official GIZ-EPRC PAK-IEM 2.0 framework with climate feedback and provincial disaggregation of generation across seven provinces. Non-power-sector demand is treated as exogenous from the official booklet pathway; this release does not perform economy-wide optimisation. The software is not affiliated with EPRC, GIZ, or BMZ.
